seo_title: Los Cab Sports Club — Southern California's Premier Athletic Club
seo_description: Welcome to Los Cab Sports Club in Fountain Valley, CA. Featuring 17 tennis courts, 59 pickleball courts, Olympic pool, fitness center, and premium club amenities.
hero_subtitle: Southern California's premier multi-sport athletic club — tennis, pickleball, fitness, swimming, and more. All under one roof.
sports_title:
Play What You Love.
All in One Place.
sports_subtitle: From competitive tennis to casual pickleball, intensive fitness to serene swimming — Los Cab has every sport covered.

sports_tiles.title: Pickleball
sports_tiles.desc: 43 dedicated + 16 hybrid lighted courts. Clinics, leagues & more.

sports_tiles.title: Tennis
sports_tiles.desc: Junior academies, adult programs & competitive leagues.

sports_tiles.title: Fitness
sports_tiles.desc: Cardio, weights, group classes, yoga, Pilates, HIIT & Barre.

sports_tiles.title: Swimming
sports_tiles.desc: Olympic heated pool, aqua fitness & Nova Swim School.

sports_tiles.title: All Sports
sports_tiles.desc: Basketball, volleyball, handball, squash, racquetball & badminton.

welcome_text: More than a gym — Los Cab is a community where athletes, families, and weekend warriors all feel at home.

features.title: The Pool
features.text: Olympic-size 50-meter heated pool. Perfect for lap swimming, cross-training, swim lessons, or a refreshing dip.

features.title: Premium Locker Rooms
features.text: Each locker room is equipped with spacious showers, steam & sauna rooms, and a co-ed jacuzzi.

features.title: Cabanas & Lounge
features.text: Semi-private cabanas with showers, lockers, fridge, and TV nestled in the tennis courtyard.

features.title: Sol Vida Café
features.text: Full-service café offering coffee, smoothies, salads, sandwiches, bagels, and more.

testimonials.quote: "Los Cab has been our family's second home for years. The pickleball courts are incredible, and the staff truly cares about the community here."
testimonials.name: Maria R.

testimonials.quote: "The tennis program here is top-notch. My kids have improved so much since joining the junior academy. Can't recommend it enough!"
testimonials.name: Jason K.

testimonials.quote: "The gym and group fitness classes are world-class. I've tried many clubs in Orange County and nothing compares to the value and quality at Los Cab."
testimonials.name: Amanda L.
